alarm.text: Captain, minor crisis: the coolant loop is running warm. I can reroute through the tea machine, or throttle the drive for a while. The tea option is faster but the crew will notice.

tea-good.text: Rerouted. Coolant nominal, and as a side effect the tea is now excellent. Engineering claims this was the plan all along.

tea-bad.text: Rerouted. Coolant is fine, but the tea now tastes of regret and slightly of coolant. The crew has formed a committee.

throttle.text: Throttling. Slow and steady. Coolant recovering. Boring, effective, and the tea is safe. A respectable captain's choice.

ignored.text: No orders received, so I improvised with duct tape and optimism. It held. This time. The duct tape has been promoted.
